readme_md:
# Recipe Pack v7 — Lettuce veg / flower (demo)

Hypothetical **HQ → site** promotion pack for multi-farm integrators. This JSON is **opaque payload** stored in `commons_catalog_entries.body` — the API does not auto-apply it.

## What integrators do

1. Curator publishes this row in the commons catalog (migration `20260527_phase31_commons_recipe_pack_v7.sql`).
2. Per site, farm admin runs [`import-recipe-pack.sh`](import-recipe-pack.sh) (or your pipeline) to:
   - Record **`POST /farms/{id}/commons/catalog-imports`** (audit / provenance)
   - Create fertigation programs via **`POST /farms/{id}/fertigation/programs`** (idempotent by program `name`)

## Safety

Programs import with **`is_active: false`** — operators review in Fertigation UI before enabling automation.

No core "broadcast to 500 farms" feature — promotion is **deliberate API calls** per `farm_id`.
promotion_note: Phase 31 WS5 demo — not a live agronomic prescription.

programs.name: Recipe Pack v7 — Lettuce Veg Standard
programs.description: Conservative veg-stage EC/pH triggers for indoor lettuce (demo pack).

programs.name: Recipe Pack v7 — Lettuce Flower Boost
programs.description: Flower-transition feed profile (demo pack). Enable only after operator review.
